# AuthorityAnchor.com

Independent reference project on semantic anchoring, provenance and authoritative reference structures.

## Canonical Resource

[Home](https://www.authorityanchor.com/)

## Main Sections

- [Sources](https://www.authorityanchor.com/sources/)

## Repository

[Authority Anchor Repository](https://github.com/semantic-infrastructure/authorityanchor)

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/semantic-infrastructure/authorityanchor/blob/main/README.md)
- [Scope](https://github.com/semantic-infrastructure/authorityanchor/blob/main/SCOPE.md)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/semantic-infrastructure/authorityanchor/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)

## Purpose

AuthorityAnchor.com provides an independent reference for semantic anchoring, provenance structures and authoritative reference mechanisms for machine-readable information systems.

## Administrative

No separate administrative resources are published.
